summary: Research completed: No clean structural solution exists for forward chain p-step. The fundamental asymmetry is epistemic - predecessors are built FROM known worlds (so P-formulas can be constrained), while successors are built TO unknown worlds (so P-formulas cannot be preemptively constrained). Recommendation: Reformulate completeness proof to avoid requiring p-step for forward chains, or accept minimal axiom if reformulation fails.

key_findings: futureDeferralDisjunctionsForP cannot constrain P-formulas not already in predecessor
temp_a axiom provides forward direction (u->v), but p-step needs reverse direction (v->u)
h_content duality does not translate to p_content constraints
Semantically p-step should hold, but no axiom enforces it in Lindenbaum extension
recommendations: Option A (preferred): Reformulate completeness to avoid forward chain p-step requirement
Option B (fallback): Add structural axiom for forward chain p-step
Option C (alternative): Restructure chain construction to build both directions simultaneously
